name: Security Misconfiguration (Missing HTTP Security Headers)
description: Detects missing critical HTTP security headers including Content-Security-Policy, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Strict-Transport-Security, Referrer-Policy, and Permissions-Policy.
author: AC3 ScanForge
remediation: Implement all recommended HTTP security headers: Content-Security-Policy (restrict resource loading), X-Frame-Options (prevent clickjacking), X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff, Strict-Transport-Security (force HTTPS), Referrer-Policy (control referrer leakage), Permissions-Policy (restrict browser features).
